name: Digico Infrastructure Reit
analysis: EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$2.5451. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry A$2.5451, stop A$2.3562, target A$2.7000. Risk/reward is 0.82:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
